context.setting: Watching TV with TV in Front

episode_text:
day=1; meal=strawberries with whipped cream; setting=Watching TV with TV in Front; time_of_day=evening;
preferences: microwave_time=no microwave; occlusion_relevance=minimize front occlusion; robot_speed=medium; skewering_axis=parallel to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=no; transfer_mode=outside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=far; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=LED; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=open mouth; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=button; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=LED; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=button; retract_between_bites=yes; bite_dipping_preference=more; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=100 sec

microwave_time.user_tendencies: IF food is cold-served fruit or dessert AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN no microwave BECAUSE the observed user chose not to reheat strawberries with whipped cream, which is consistent with a cold-served meal. No broader context-dependent variation observed yet.

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF dining context is watching TV in front AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any observed food condition THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE the user selected a front-visibility-preserving behavior when attending to a TV in front. Otherwise, no context-dependent variation observed yet.

skewering_axis.user_tendencies: IF food requires fork acquisition during feeding AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is the observed fruit meal THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE the user selected this bite shape/orientation, suggesting comfort with narrower bites. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF transfer_mode is outside mouth transfer AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN far BECAUSE the user chose a larger stand-off distance, consistent with comfort and lower intrusiveness while engaged with a front-facing activity. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transf.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes watching TV in front AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any observed food condition THEN LED BECAUSE the user preferred a nonverbal cue in the observed front-attention context. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF task is feeding AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN open mouth BECAUSE the user selected a low-effort readiness signal and has the physical ability to use it reliably. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

IF task is drinking AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN button BECAUSE the user selected explicit control for sip initiation and is physically able to press buttons. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

IF task is mouth wiping AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN button BECAUSE the user selected explicit control for wipe initiation and is physically able to press buttons. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transf.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes watching TV in front AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any observed food condition THEN LED BECAUSE the user preferred a nonverbal completion cue in the observed context. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding.user_tendencies: IF task is feeding AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN perception BECAUSE the user selected the reliable low-effort completion method for bites. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking.user_tendencies: IF task is drinking AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN button BECAUSE the user selected explicit completion signaling for drinking rather than automatic continuation. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping.user_tendencies: IF task is mouth wiping AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN button BECAUSE the user selected explicit completion signaling for wiping. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF dining context is watching TV in front AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any observed food condition THEN yes BECAUSE the user preferred the robot to retract between actions to reduce prolonged front occlusion while attending to the TV. Otherwise, no context-dependent variation observed yet.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF food includes a dip or sauce AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is watching TV in front THEN more BECAUSE the user selected a stronger dipping preference for strawberries with whipped cream. IF food has no dip or sauce THEN do not dip BECAUSE dipping is not applicable.
